name: White Oud Eau de Parfum
short: A luminous oud eau de parfum blending rich Indian oud with subtle white florals for an opulent, long-lasting fragrance.
description: White Oud is a luminous eau de parfum that reimagines the depth of Indian oud with a softer, more luminous hand. The composition opens with a bright flash of bergamot and pink pepper, blooms into a heart of white rose and jasmine, and settles into a warm, golden base of oud, amber, and sandalwood. Composed at high concentration for exceptional sillage and 12+ hour longevity. Hand-filled and finished in our Udaipur atelier. A modern, approachable oud — for those who want the richness without the smoke.
benefits: Luminous oud composition with white florals
Weighted glass flacon with brass-tone cap
usage: Spritz onto pulse points — wrists, neck, behind the ears — from a distance of 6 inches. Do not rub. Reapply as desired. A beautiful year-round signature scent.
